overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a downtown urban environment at night. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses multiple streets, passes illuminated commercial buildings and a taco truck, and finally approaches a medical center emergency room entrance.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to commercial buildings with red and white striped awnings

entered.detail: red and white striped commercial awning over storefront windows
beige stone commercial building with large windows
multi-lane asphalt road with moving traffic and street lamps
tall illuminated glass office towers visible in the distance
classic black street lamp illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk at night, passing commercial buildings with distinctive red striped awnings on the right. The city street runs parallel on the left with sparse traffic, while distant skyscrapers rise against the dark sky ahead.

events.description: turns left from sidewalk onto crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
reaches opposite sidewalk with brightly illuminated display windows

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection then continuing along the sidewalk past brightly lit storefront displays

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on asphalt
large brightly lit display windows with mannequins and signage
white sport utility vehicle parked along the curb
tall palm trees lining the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The character turns left to cross the wide urban intersection, moving from the covered sidewalk into the open street. After crossing, the scene shifts to a sidewalk lined with brightly illuminated storefront windows on the left and parked cars on the right, with palm trees visible further down the street.

events.description: taco truck drives past on the street to the right
character crosses another street intersection with cars approaching

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past commercial buildings, crossing another street intersection while vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: taco truck with illuminated signage driving past on the street

entered.detail: food truck with bright yellow illuminated signage on top
yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the downtown sidewalk, passing a yellow fire hydrant and a taco truck that drives by on the right. The segment ends with the character crossing another street intersection as cars approach with headlights on.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical center entrance and parking garage

events.description: walking alongside concrete parking garage structure
arriving at Pillbox Hill Medical Center emergency entrance with illuminated signage

agents.ego_description: walking past the parking garage structure toward the brightly lit medical center emergency room entrance

entered.detail: multi-level concrete parking garage with vehicle entrance
large hospital building with illuminated windows and signage
red illuminated EMERGENCY sign above hospital entrance
covered drop-off area with bright fluorescent lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sidewalk next to a concrete parking garage on the left, with the street on the right. As the character progresses, the Pillbox Hill Medical Center comes into view ahead, featuring a brightly illuminated emergency room entrance with red signage and a covered ambulance bay.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit downtown district that gradually leads toward a brightly illuminated medical facility. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk past commercial buildings with red striped awnings, moving parallel to a street with distant skyscrapers looming ahead. As the character turns left to cross a wide urban intersection, the scene shifts to a sidewalk lined with glowing storefront windows and palm trees. The journey continues past a yellow fire hydrant and a passing taco truck before crossing another street intersection amidst the glare of approaching headlights. Finally, the camera follows the character past a concrete parking garage as the Pillbox Hill Medical Center comes into view, ending at the red signage of the illuminated emergency room entrance.
